description: Configure SeisComP's Real-Time Trace View (scrttv) to display archived BHZ waveform data from GE network stations using the sdsarchive recordstream at /home/ga/seiscomp/var/lib/archive. The configuration must include a 2nd-order Butterworth bandpass filter (BW(2,0.5,8.0)) and a buffer size of at least 1800 seconds. Save the configuration to ~/seiscomp/etc/scrttv.cfg, launch the application to visualize the waveforms, and save a screenshot of the interface to /home/ga/scrttv_screenshot.png.
